requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

requests.original_question: Find Breast Cancer trials using Chemotherapy with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Chemotherapy' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: Show trials of Brentuximab-vedotin combined with other treatments for Multiple Myeloma, including their total sample sizes and trial phases?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Total sample size", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma';

requests.original_question: List the year and trial phase for gastric cancer trials using Nivolumab with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/GEJ' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: Show the NCT identifier, author, publication details, meta-analysis inclusion status, ICI class, cancer type, and ICI name for Small Cell Lung studies using PD1 agents that were included in a meta-analysis?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Included in MA" = 'Yes';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 2 Tremelimumab trials in Mesothelioma that were original publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

requests.original_question: Which trials studied Pembrolizumab for Head and Neck cancer?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck';

requests.original_question: Which trials of Tremelimumab for Mesothelioma were in phase 2?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

requests.original_question: Find trials for Urothelial cancer that used CTLA-4 and required PD-L1 positivity for participation?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4';

requests.original_question: Show the cancer type and trial phase for colorectal cancer trials using PD-L1 where PD-L1 positivity was not required for participation?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

requests.original_question: Which clinical trials used an antibody-drug conjugate as the control?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';

requests.original_question: Which trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer had at least 2 arms and used chemotherapy as a control?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Number of arms" >= 2 AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

requests.original_question: Which trials evaluated chemotherapy in phase 3 for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancers?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Chemotherapy' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

requests.original_question: Show trials for Melanoma using PD-L1 and CTLA-4 where PD-L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

requests.original_question: Find the trials for prostate cancer that are phase 2, use tremelimumab, and are follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

requests.original_question: Which trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer used chemotherapy as the control arm and list the author and control arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Control arm" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

requests.original_question: Show the author and year for renal cell cancer trials using PD-L1 where PD-L1 positivity was not required for participation?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

requests.original_question: Find Hodgkin Lymphoma trials using Tremelimumab as a single agent?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Tremelimumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

requests.original_question: Show trials for hepatocellular cancer that used combination treatment and had at least 2 prior lines of therapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular';

requests.original_question: Which Multiple Myeloma studies tested combinations of immunotherapy and radiation therapy, and what treatments were used?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Chemo';

requests.original_question: Which trials for prostate cancer compared radiation to other treatments in phase 3?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate' AND "Control arm" = 'Radiation';

requests.original_question: Which Phase 3 trials evaluating PD-L1 monotherapy for colorectal cancer should I review, and what are their treatment regimens?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

requests.original_question: Which non-small cell lung cancer studies tested immunotherapy plus chemotherapy combinations, and what were the primary endpoints?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'NSCLC' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Chemo';

requests.original_question: List trials using PD1 that reported co-primary endpoints?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Name of ICI", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Co-primary';

requests.original_question: Show the publication status and trial phase for hepatocellular cancer trials using immune checkpoint inhibitors plus anti-VEGF combinations?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Anti-VEGF';

requests.original_question: Which trials for Mesothelioma specified neoadjuvant ICI use?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Trial phase", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma';

requests.original_question: Which trials used best supportive care as the control arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Best supportive care';

requests.original_question: List trials of Atezolizumab for Multiple Myeloma with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: Which breast cancer trials used chemotherapy or a tyrosine kinase inhibitor as a control and had at least 4 arms?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Chemo/TKI';

requests.original_question: What are the regimens, publication details, and trial phase for Phase 3 PD-L1 and CTLA-4 combination trials in Small Cell Lung cancer?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1, CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

requests.original_question: Which phase 2 trials compared immunotherapy to a BRAF and MEK inhibitor?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'TKI';
